# Fixture: mary_waclawik_referral
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 34.8s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Mary! Welcome to Shiftsmart. Are you ready to start your orientation?
Partner: Not yet also some did refer me

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Cool, no rush. For the referral, open the app and go to Profile → Promos → "Invite Friends, Earn Money" (or scroll to the bottom of the Home tab and tap "Learn more") — that page shows your referrer's name, countdown, and progress. You'll get your bonus once you complete required shifts within 30 days of signing up — shifts at any of our partners count. If you don't finish in time, the offer expires.
